description: Settings from Single (Settings) doctypes that apply to a given doctype. Up to one standard (shipped) and one custom (user) record per doctype; the active record's grid surfaces in the target doctype's DocType Settings → General tab.

fields.description: The DocType these settings apply to.
fields.label: Applies to DocType

fields.description: Standard maps are shipped with an app and can only be changed in Developer Mode. Leave unchecked for user-created (custom) maps.
fields.label: Is standard

fields.description: When active, this map is used for its doctype. An active custom map overrides the standard one.
fields.label: Is active

fields.description: Each row maps a field on a Single (Settings) doctype to surface for this doctype.
fields.label: Mappings

name: DocType Settings Map
